response.justification: Candidate has only ~7 months of professional C/C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) plus a university thesis, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed (only MongoDB, MySQL, generic SQL), and no exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains. Core background is web/full-stack in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — strong engineer, but a clear mismatch for this role.
strengths: Solid full-stack engineering track record with strong testing/TDD discipline
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer-tools product
Excellent communication skills demonstrated via talks, workshops, and courses
concerns: Lacks the required 5-10 years of professional C++ development on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; no demonstrated enterprise RDBMS depth
No fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain background
